stemHtml:
In the context of the general atmospheric circulation, which combination of vertical air movements at specific latitude bands correctly describes the global pattern of updraughts and downdraughts?

1. Updraughts over the 60°N and 60°S parallels
2. Downdraughts over the 60°N and 60°S parallels
3. Updraughts over the 30°N and 30°S parallels
4. Downdraughts over the 30°N and 30°S parallels
5. Updraughts over the equator
6. Downdraughts over the equator
